description: Spicy from gatsby for men has a sizzling spicy fragrance with double deodorant protection which promises to reduce body odour by using a combination of two active ingredients: Triclosan and o-Cymen-5-OL.Quantity: 200 mlCautionFor external use onlyDo not spray into the eyesDo not inhaleDo not use when smoking or near a flameKeep away from childrenDo not expose to temperature
